name: Chocolate Raspberry Spritz
recipeIngredient: 1 package NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Rainbow Morsels (9 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt Nestle unsweetened chocolate baking bars; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter, sugar, and salt until creamy. Blend in egg, raspberry preserves, and vanilla extract. Gradually blend in melted chocolate.
4. Gradually add flour to the mixture. Place dough into a cookie press fitted with the desired plate.
5. Press dough onto ungreased cookie sheets; decorate with Nestle Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Rainbow Morsels.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes until set. Let cool for 1 minute before removing from cookie sheets. Cool completely.
7. Makes 8 dozen cookies.
